devopsguru.resourcecollection.resourceco: Information about a filter used to specify which AWS resources are analyzed for anomalous behavior by DevOps Guru.

devopsguru.resourcecollection.resourceco.Description: Information about AWS CloudFormation stacks. You can use up to 500 stacks to specify which AWS resources in your account to analyze. For more information, see [Stacks](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AWSCloudFormation/latest/UserGuide/stacks.html) in the * AWS CloudFormation User Guide*.
